variants: Zekeriya Akca, a noted meteorologist, resides in Hemlock Court, where he has focused his research on advancing weather technology. He developed the Whisperbolt Recorder, an innovative instrument that improves the ability to track and analyze meteorological data. His exceptional contributions to the field have resulted in him being awarded the Celestial Prism Award. In addition to his scientific pursuits, Zekeriya is an active member of the Noonbright Mapmakers, connecting with others who share his passion for mapping and exploration. His work exemplifies a deep commitment to enhancing both meteorology and cartography.
